Annapolis Host & Sailing Adventures

Sail into the golden hour on the Chesapeake

From the Magothy River past the Bay Bridge to open Chesapeake waters — aboard the 45′ Hylas Kadima!, captained by Elliot Nudell.

Reserve Your Sail Explore the Route
scroll

The Experience

Four hours on open water

Every sail begins on the Magothy River and heads into the heart of the Chesapeake — past the iconic Bay Bridge, under the shadow of the Baltimore Light, and into the wide open bay. Day sails shimmer under clear blue skies; sunset sails burn gold and violet as the sun drops behind the Western Shore.

Magothy River
Departure — calm waters, easy boarding
Chesapeake Bay Bridge
4.3 miles of iconic steel — stunning by day or dusk
Baltimore Light
Historic lighthouse, open bay, full sail
Open Chesapeake
Relax, explore, watch the horizon glow

Life Aboard

On the water

The Vessel & Captain

Kadima!
45′ Hylas Sloop

Built for bluewater cruising, the Hylas 45 is celebrated for her stable, comfortable ride and spacious cockpit — perfect for guests who want to relax while the miles roll by, or take a turn at the helm. Every detail reflects serious seamanship without sacrificing comfort.

Captain Elliot Nudell brings years of offshore sailing experience to every voyage. His easy-going style and deep knowledge of the Chesapeake make every sail both safe and memorable.

Duration 4 Hours
Vessel 45′ Hylas
Departure Magothy River
Min. Guests 2 Persons

Pricing

Simple, transparent rates

All sails are 4 hours. Bring your own food & beverages. Sunset and daytime departures available — contact us to check availability.

Couple / Pair

$250

per person · minimum 2 guests

  • 4-hour sail on the Chesapeake
  • Bay Bridge & Baltimore Light route
  • Captain Elliot Nudell
  • Aboard the 45′ Hylas Kadima!
Best Value

Group Rate

$200

per person · groups of 3 or more

  • 4-hour sail on the Chesapeake
  • Bay Bridge & Baltimore Light route
  • Captain Elliot Nudell
  • Aboard the 45′ Hylas Kadima!
  • More guests, more fun
